title: Video: Sick? Take Precautions | Respiratory Illnesses | CDC

Video: Sick? Take Precautions 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this video and sample messages to share what people can do if they feel sick from respiratory illnesses, like flu, RSV, and COVID-19. 
Videos are formatted for Meta (Facebook, Instagram) and X. 
Format: MP4 Language: English (US) Length: 
Sick with a respiratory illness? Take precautions to help stop the spread. (Meta platforms)

Learn essential tips to take care of yourself and help stop the spread if you get sick with a respir... 
Aug. 26, 2025 
Sample messages 
For older adults and their families 
Message 1 
Respiratory illnesses can pose serious health risks to people who are 65 or older because immune systems weaken with age, making it harder to fight off infections. If you're 65 or older, it's important to seek medical care if you get sick. Learn why timely treatment is crucial to your health at https://bit.ly/4lWF8qA 
Message 2 
The older we get, the weaker our immune system can become — making it harder to fight off infections. So if you’re 65 or older, getting quick medical attention when you have
